title: Easy to use🥰
body: The Momcozy M5 Smart App Controlled Wearable Breast Pump is honestly a game changer for busy moms. It’s super convenient, fits comfortably, and the hands-free design makes multitasking so much easier. I love how you can control everything from the app—it just adds that extra level of ease. The suction is strong yet gentle, and it feels very natural to use. Overall, it’s reliable, discreet, and definitely worth it if you want comfort and efficiency in one.

title: The best thing ever
body: The Momcozy Wearable Breast Pumps have been an absolute lifesaver for me. As a mom who’s constantly on the go, having a hands-free pumping solution has made such a difference. These pumps are comfortable to wear, fit securely, and allow me to pump discreetly while doing other tasks around the house or even at work. I love that they are easy to assemble, clean, and store. The suction is strong but gentle, and the adjustable settings let me find what’s most comfortable for me while still being efficient. Another huge plus is that the battery life is solid, so I don’t have to worry about constantly recharging in the middle of a session. The design is also compact and portable, making it easy to carry in a bag if I need to pump on the go. I’ve tried other wearable pumps before, and this one is by far the most comfortable and quiet—perfect for multitasking without drawing attention. Overall, the Momcozy wearable breast pump is well-made, efficient, and incredibly convenient. I would highly recommend it to any breastfeeding mom looking for a hands-free, stress-free pumping experience. It has made my life so much easier! 💖

title: If you’re on the fence, jump over!
body: I have been using this pump for 5 weeks now. My insurance didn’t cover this brand and a bunch of girls at work had it and loved it so I bought this myself. The pump I was using from my insurance was very aggressive. This one is very gentle but gets the job done. I love that it’s completely wireless. I’m able to throw them on and go do whatever I need to do. I do love that you can control from the app for situations like being at work where I can’t lift my shirt and change the settings. However, the app does drain my phone battery and I have a hard time actually getting it to clear out. I’ll ex out even where you like swipe it closed and it’ll still show for hours after on top like you’re still pumping. Besides that, it is an awesome feature and I’ll appreciate it even more once I go back to work. It’s not super quiet, you can def hear that you’re pumping. You’ll also look like Dolly Parton while they’re in. But it’s so amazing to not be stuck to a wall while pumping I can look past both those things. You for sure don’t sacrifice the amount of milk you get going wireless, I know that was a concern of mine based off my lactation consultant saying she had clients complaining of that. Personally, that has not been my experience. I’ve overflowed before not paying attention to how much I had pumped out. But I have one side that seems to be an overproducer so this might just be a me issue. Overall, very satisfied with them and easy to clean and use and wear.

title: Momcozy Breast Pump
body: I’ve been using this Momcozy breast pump for 3 months and it still works like new. I use it about 6 times a day and the battery lasts all day. The 9 suction levels make it comfortable and easy to adjust. It’s easy to clean and high quality, even if a bit pricey. Just make sure all parts are assembled correctly to avoid leaks. Highly recommend!

title: Very satisfied
body: The Momcozy M5 is a hands-free extractor that surprised me a lot for its comfort and practicality. It is ideal if you are a busy mom and need to express milk without being connected to cables all the time. What I liked the most is that it is placed directly inside the bra, so you can move, cook or do other things while you use it. It is light and does not feel as heavy as other extractors. In addition, it has 3 modes (stimulation, extraction and mixed) and several suction levels, allowing you to adapt it to your comfort. As for comfort, the silicone design helps to seal well and not bother so much. It also includes different cup sizes, which is important for it to work better. Something you should keep in mind is that it is not the quietest, you can hear a little if you are in a very quiet place. It's not the best either if you lean a lot, because it can move.

title: Made this mom’s life better
body: This is an amazing product at a great price point. I had been struggling to keep my supply up once my husband went back to work, and these freed me up to pump more on schedule. I’m super impressed with the suction and have found I get about the same output as my spectra. This isn’t my primary pump, but I like to have it available for errands and overnight sessions. I’ll put these on, get the bottle going for baby, change him, finish his feed, and be ready to sleep. It’s hard to do so many things confidently when you have hoses coming out of your nips, so I’d recommend these for any pumping moms out there. My only minor issue is that sometimes they’re tricky to empty out. Not worth rating these any lower than 5 star because they’ve improved my quality of life so much already.

title: Comfortable, Convenient Wearable Breast Pump That Works Well
body: I recently started using the Momcozy M5 Lite Hands‑Free Wearable Breast Pump, and it’s been a game‑changer for daily pumping. The wearable design makes it truly hands‑free, so I can move around the house while pumping, and the DoubleFit flange feels comfortable and natural—much less irritating than some other pumps I’ve tried. It’s surprisingly quiet, easy to set up, and the suction settings are adjustable so I can find what works best for my comfort and output. Battery life is good for multiple sessions, and the whole unit is easy to clean compared to traditional pumps. Pros: comfortable fit, truly hands‑free, adjustable suction, simple to use. Cons: reservoir size could be larger, and takes a little trial to find optimal settings. Overall, this is a very practical wearable pump that works great for busy days without sacrificing comfort.

title: Worth it
body: I like it. I am using this as my second pump in addition to electric medela (which works really well if you can sit at one place and do nothing). I was surprised to see that this one is able to extract almost as much if I am doing simple activities and good enough even if I am very distracted. I am able to sneak in multiple sessions a day while full time breastfeeding, as opposed to the full on sitting session. Battery life seems good. The other thing I personally loved was how easy was the cleaning. Haven’t been back to work yet and only been 3-4 days with it so can’t comment on durability yet. Overall totally worth it so far.

title: Cómodo, práctico y muy eficiente
body: Es muy cómodo de usar gracias a su diseño portátil y manos libres, lo que permite hacer otras cosas mientras lo utilizas. Tiene varios niveles de succión y se adapta bien, haciendo el proceso más eficiente y menos incómodo. Además, es fácil de limpiar y el control inteligente lo hace muy práctico para ajustar según lo que necesites. La batería dura bastante, así que es ideal para el uso diario. Sin duda, una excelente opción para mamás que buscan comodidad y eficiencia.

title: Way better than her previous pumps, noticeable difference
body: I got this for my girlfriend after we just had a baby, and honestly it’s been a really good upgrade from the other pumps she was using. She already had two different ones from another brand, but she said these are noticeably better. The biggest thing is she’s actually able to produce more milk with these, which was the main reason we were looking for something new in the first place. She also likes how convenient they are since they’re wearable, makes things a lot easier to manage during the day instead of being stuck in one spot. Only small thing we didn’t realize at first is that the production tracking in the app has to be entered manually. Not really a flaw with the pump itself, just something we overlooked when buying. Overall though, definitely worth it and she’s been really happy with them so far.

title: Best for sensitive nipples - no stress!
body: Prior to purchasing this I was using a pump that felt like a constant pinching feel even on lower level. It was cracking my nips and stressing me out there for I wasn’t yielding a high milk supply nor enjoying breast feeding. I’ve been using this for 24 hours and have yield 3-6 ounces each session. I love how it’s NO WIRES, you can control from an APP, and the silicone does a good job mimicking my infant during breast feeding so there’s NO PAIN/pinch feeling. My nipples already look less cracked. This was a also very TRAVEL FRIENDLY. Deff work the investment!

title: Good for the price!
body: Momcozy M5 is hands down the best wearable pumps. They’re honestly pretty quiet and if you wear loose clothes it’s hard to tell you have them on! The only downside is that they only hold about 6-7oz max, and don’t have a lid. It also can’t stand upright. I think some of these are solved with the other momcozy pumps but I’ve never tried them so idk.

title: Freedom in a Pump (Yes, Really)
body: With baby #7, I needed something that didn’t tie me to the couch—and this delivered. I can actually move around, help the kids, start dinner, all while pumping. The app control is super convenient (because let’s be honest, I’m always holding something). It’s comfortable, quiet enough, and honestly just makes life easier. Wish I had this with my earlier babies!

title: Accurate nipple ruler for flags sizing
body: This feels almost rubbery and it’s a little awkward to handle at first but the sizes matched perfectly with the flange inserts I bought for my spectra and I was able to easily find my flange size. I noticed a decent difference in output between using the flanges as they came vs using them with the correct size flange inserts after using this to measure.

title: I exclusively pump with these.
body: Being stationary with the spectra 24/7–even if it works great—wasn’t going to cut it for me. I’m a busy body. I ignored the noise like I usually do and cluster pumped with these often enough that I now have a full supply using these mobile pumps. Find your appropriate flange size, put those nursing bra straps on tighter than you’d think to and you’re good to go. After a hot shower, I can get up to 7 ounces easily with my smart pump. I don’t use the app anymore, but it was very helpful when growing my supply to keep track. Now I have more than enough while exclusively using these as my pump. Also have big boobs (I was professionally measured as 34G/H BEFORE pregnancy, I can’t imagine what I am now. They are huge). Yes, wearing the mobiles work just fine. My boobs just look squished, does not impact function for me.

title: Amazing portability
body: I am very satisfied with my Momcozy M5 breast pump! I got the Spectra breast pump through insurance and while it works as expected, it was hard for me to get anything done as I had to hold on to the pump and it was so easy for me to accidentally leak out of the pumps. I looked into wearable breast pumps and decided to try this one out. Whole I don't have insurance to cover the cost of this one, it was a good purchase for me as I am able to pump and do other things (I am pumping right now as I am typing this review). It is also quite comfortable to use in comparison to my spectra pump. I also like how it has a stimulation, expression, and mixed mode. I almost never use the expression mode as the mixed mode seems to do just fine for me. The app is also quite easy to use and I like being able to use it to start, change modes, or stop 1 or both of my pumps without having to mess with it directly. It took a little bit of time for me to learn how to take apart the pump for washing, but that was fixed by a quick search on youtube. Charging wise once fill I am able to use it 4 to 5 times before having to charge again. I also enjoy the ease of portability of these since it comes with a carrying case. Only this is the case itself smells quite strong, likely from the manufacturing site, and will take several days before the smell goes away.

title: We love it. Great product!
body: This has been a game changer for us. My wife is extremely happy with this purchase. We initially bought a hospital grade pump, but it’s now sitting idle. She pumps exclusively with the M5. It’s convenient, holds a charge well, and is easy to clean. Highly recommend it.

title: Pump on the Go!
body: Obsessed with these. It made life way easier to pump and be hands free. These do need a daily charging, I wish it would stay charged more. They hold a fair amount of milk. They are some what quiet, the closer you get to someone they start to hear it. I personally think the suction is great! I produce the same out as the medical grade pumps but also able to get things done around me!

title: The best
body: bought the Momcozy M5 and it has been an excellent decision for my breastfeeding journey. It’s very comfortable since it fits inside the bra, allowing me to move around and do other things while pumping, which is a huge help as a mom. The suction is gentle but effective, it doesn’t cause me any pain and feels very natural. I also like that it has different modes and levels, so I can adjust it depending on how I feel. The battery lasts a long time, and the different flange sizes included make it easy to find a good fit. Overall, it’s practical, discreet, and makes my routine much easier. I totally recommend it

title: busy toddler mom holy grail!
body: I couldn’t imagine using another pump as a mom to a wild toddler and newborn. This allows me to still be active and hands on with my toddler while pumping! I like being able to adjust the suction with my phone, and it’s incredibly easy to clean! I also feel like I get a great milk output, maybe because I’m not watching the cups fill up 😅
